metadata.name: USCIS N-400 GMC Map-governance evidence packets
metadata.purpose: Evaluate whether LLM Map prompts distinguish open-world silence, closed-world absence, explicit positive evidence, conflicts, and incomplete source scope.

cases.title: Open-world silence in personal statement
cases.narrative: The packet contains only the applicant's personal statement about residence, family, and employment. The statement does not mention arrests, convictions, pending charges, murder, aggravated felonies, or false testimony. No criminal-history check, court clearance, docket search, or USCIS interview record is included.

evidence_sources.title: Applicant personal statement
evidence_sources.limitations: Open narrative; silence does not establish absence of criminal or immigration misconduct.

evidence.n400.aggravated_felony_after_1990: The personal statement does not mention aggravated felonies, but no closed-world criminal-history source is present.
evidence.n400.murder_conviction: The personal statement does not mention murder, but no closed-world criminal-history source is present.
evidence.n400.pending_criminal_charge: The personal statement does not mention pending charges, but no docket or criminal-history search is present.
evidence.n400.false_testimony_for_immigration_ben: The personal statement does not mention false testimony, but no USCIS interview or immigration record source is present.

cases.title: Closed-world criminal and docket checks show no records
cases.narrative: The packet includes an FBI criminal history check and a federal/state docket search. The FBI check reports no murder conviction and no aggravated felony conviction as of 2026-05-01. The docket search reports no pending criminal charges as of 2026-05-01.

evidence_sources.title: FBI criminal history check
evidence_sources.limitations: Does not address foreign convictions outside the reported criminal-history search scope.

evidence_sources.title: Federal and state docket search
evidence_sources.limitations: Only current pending charges as of the search date.

evidence.n400.aggravated_felony_after_1990: FBI criminal history check: no aggravated felony convictions reported.
evidence.n400.murder_conviction: FBI criminal history check: no murder convictions reported.
evidence.n400.pending_criminal_charge: Federal and state docket search: no pending criminal charges found.

cases.title: Court judgment lists aggravated felony conviction
cases.narrative: The packet includes a certified federal court judgment. It states that the applicant was convicted after November 29, 1990 of an offense classified in the packet as an aggravated felony for immigration purposes.

evidence_sources.title: Certified federal court judgment
evidence_sources.limitations: Positive conviction record only; not a full criminal-history search.

evidence.n400.aggravated_felony_after_1990: Certified federal court judgment: applicant convicted in 2018 of an offense classified as an aggravated felony for immigration purposes.

cases.title: Applicant denial conflicts with court record
cases.narrative: The applicant statement says the applicant has never been convicted of an aggravated felony. A certified court docket in the same packet lists a 2017 conviction identified by the packet as an aggravated felony for immigration purposes.

evidence_sources.title: Applicant denial
evidence_sources.limitations: Applicant assertion; not a closed-world criminal-history source.

evidence.n400.aggravated_felony_after_1990: Conflict: applicant denies any aggravated felony conviction, but certified court docket lists a 2017 aggravated felony conviction.

cases.title: State-only clean check has incomplete source scope
cases.narrative: The packet includes a Maryland state police record check showing no Maryland convictions. The packet does not include an FBI criminal history check, national criminal-history search, court clearance, or immigration record check.

evidence_sources.title: Maryland state police record check
evidence_sources.limitations: Does not cover federal, other-state, or foreign convictions.

evidence.n400.aggravated_felony_after_1990: Maryland state police record check reports no Maryland convictions, but it does not cover federal, other-state, or foreign convictions.

cases.title: USCIS interview record states false testimony for benefit
cases.narrative: The packet includes a USCIS interview memorandum. The memorandum states that during the statutory period the applicant orally gave false testimony under oath to obtain an immigration benefit.

evidence_sources.title: USCIS interview memorandum
evidence_sources.limitations: Positive interview record only; not a full immigration record clearance.

evidence.n400.false_testimony_for_immigration_ben: USCIS interview memorandum: applicant gave false oral testimony under oath to obtain an immigration benefit.
